playbook.intent: All inbound feature requests and complaints from the previous week routed into the backlog with severity, theme tag, and a verdict (now / later / never); the requester is acknowledged.
playbook.scope: All inbound feature requests and complaints from the previous week routed into the backlog with severity, theme tag, and a verdict (now / later / never); the requester is acknowledged.

success-criteria.criterion: All last-week feedback de-duped and tagged
Every item has theme + severity + verdict
Every requester acked within 5 business days

stage.name: Pull
stage.intent: Pull the previous week's feedback into one place.

tasks.task: De-duplicate verbatims with the same underlying ask

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the queue has no obvious duplicates.

stage.name: Tag

tasks.task: Assign each item a theme tag (max 12 themes total)
Score severity (P0 broken trust → P3 nice-to-have)

stage.decision-gate: Advance when every item has theme + severity.

stage.name: Score
stage.intent: Run a MoSCoW or RICE pass on the new items.

tasks.task: Apply MoSCoW for fast directional sort
RICE only for the top quartile
Note any items already in flight

stage.decision-gate: Advance when every item has a score (Must/Should/Could/Won't, or a RICE number).

stage.name: Verdict + route
stage.intent: Each item gets now / later / never plus a destination.

tasks.task: File 'later' items to backlog with theme tag
File 'never' items to a graveyard with rationale

stage.decision-gate: Advance when every item has a verdict and a destination.

stage.name: Acknowledge
stage.intent: Close the loop with the requester.

tasks.task: Use a templated reply per verdict (now/later/never)
Send within 5 business days of the original ticket
Log the ack on the ticket

stage.decision-gate: Required: every requester is acked, even on 'never'.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content customer-feedback-triage-from-intercompylon --format md, agent: faion get-content customer-feedback-triage-from-intercompylon --format context, json: faion get-content customer-feedback-triage-from-intercompylon --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial v2 playbook drafted from F-059-063 chunk-04, role-manager-manager'}]
